products.title: Professional Facial Steamer Single Arm E-34 | White
products.body_html:
Color: White
Material: Polypropylene (PP)
Brand: HinLIaDa
Model Name: Beauty Sprayer
Skin Type: All

This professional facial steamer is the perfect addition to your skincare routine, whether for home or professional use. With advanced technology and a user-friendly design, it delivers exceptional results for all skin types.

  • Professional Nano Ion Technology: Enhances water absorption deeper and faster with water ion atomization.
  • 360° Rotating Nozzle: Adjustable angle to meet various needs.
  • Large Water Tank: Prolongs spray time and prevents overflow with a rubber stopper.
  • Perfect for Professionals: Ideal for spas, salons, beauty clinics, or home use.
  • Stable and Mobile Design: Features a 4-leg wheeled base for easy mobility in any workspace.

Technical specifications:

  • Color: White
  • Material: Polypropylene (PP)
  • Voltage: 110V
  • Power: 800W

Upgrade your beauty routine with this innovative and professional facial steamer. Experience the convenience and benefits of spa-quality treatments from the comfort of your home.

products.title: Professional Facial Steamer Single Arm E-39 | Black
products.body_html:
Color: Black
Material: High-quality plastic
Voltage: 220V
Power: 800W

This professional-grade facial steamer in a sleek black design is perfect for both personal and professional use. It provides a soothing mist to cleanse and hydrate your skin while offering advanced features for optimal performance.

  • Efficient Heating: Uses a heating tube method to produce mist in 1-2 minutes. Safe and gentle for the skin, with a steam temperature of 42°C.
  • Large Water Tank: The 0.75-liter capacity minimizes the need for frequent refills. The transparent tank makes it easy to monitor the water level.
  • Adjustable Height: The rod height can be adjusted between 30 and 40 cm to suit different usage needs.
  • Safety Features: Includes an automatic alarm system that activates when water is low. The device turns off to prevent damage, ensuring safe operation.
  • Easy Maintenance: Designed with a smooth surface for easy cleaning after each use. Simply wipe off dust and residue with a cloth.
  • Mobility: Equipped with a stable 4-leg wheeled base for easy movement around your workspace.

Experience spa-quality treatments in the comfort of your home or provide professional-grade care to your clients with this reliable and stylish facial steamer.

products.title: Mini LED Nail Lamp 18W Nail Art Tools
products.body_html:
Features:

  1. Uniform Lighting: This mini nail curing lamp features 6 bright chips that ensure even and efficient drying of nail gel, saving energy.
  2. Quick Drying: Suitable for all nail polish glues, it helps dry the glue quickly without causing blackening of your skin.
  3. Dual Light Source: The nail dryer adopts a dual LED light source design, providing gentle lighting that won't harm your skin and eyes.
  4. Portable Size: This gel nail curing lamp is compact and lightweight, making it easy to carry for outdoor and travel use.
  5. Durable ABS: Made of high-quality ABS material, the nail polish curing lamp is sturdy and durable, resistant to breaking.

⚠️ Warning – Safety

products.title: Nail lamp UV LED | White | 96 LED | 256W
products.body_html:
Product Description:

Discover the portable professional 256W nail lamp, perfect for achieving a flawless manicure. This UV LED nail lamp is designed to cure all types of gel nail polish and provide a professional finish.

Specifications:

  • LED Beads: 96 LEDs
  • Timer: 10S / 30S / 60S / 99S / 120S
  • Size: 44.5 x 22.5 x 13 cm

Features:

  • Uniform LED Distribution: The 96 LED beads are evenly distributed, ensuring even drying with no dead angles. The soft light is designed not to harm the eyes.
  • Durability: Each LED bead has a lifespan of 50,000 hours, ensuring prolonged use.
  • Practical Design: Equipped with a timer and LED display, this lamp allows synchronized curing with a time memory function.
  • Low-Temperature Mode: Choose from 10S, 30S, 60S, 99S, and 120S modes based on the thickness of the gel for optimal drying without damaging your nails.

Benefits:

  • Safety and Comfort: The lamp’s soft light is designed to protect your eyes while providing effective drying.
  • Rapid Efficiency: With its 96 LED beads, this lamp ensures quick and efficient curing of all gel types.
  • Intuitive Use: The various timer options allow you to easily customize the drying duration based on your needs.

⚠️ Warning – Safety

Never look directly at the UV LED lamp while it is on. This lamp emits UV-A rays (long wavelength) which can damage the retina and eyes upon direct or repeated exposure. Keep out of reach of children. For prolonged use, wear UV-protective glasses.

products.title: Nail Dust Collector | Wireless | 80W
products.body_html:
Say goodbye to messy nail dust with the Wireless Nail Dust Collector 80W! Designed for professional nail technicians and at-home users, this powerful vacuum ensures a clean and dust-free workspace while offering wireless convenience.

✨ Key Features:

  • ✅ High-Power Suction (80W): Effectively captures nail dust from filing and polishing.
  • ✅ Wireless & Rechargeable: Enjoy full mobility with its built-in battery.
  • ✅ Fine Filter System: Removable and washable filter for long-term use.
  • ✅ Low Noise & High Efficiency: Powerful yet quiet motor for a professional experience.
  • ✅ Compact & Sleek Design: Perfect for salons or personal use.
